text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the Tokyo Daishoten, I arrive at
the racecourse wearing orange, which had been
Copano Rickey's lucky color back at her debut
race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She used to think proving the power of feng shui
meant becoming as skilled as her rivals. But now
that isn't enough.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She believes that she'll only prove the power of
feng shui by rising above to stand at the pinnacle.
Her sights are set on the champion's throne.
